ValidationRule.description: Prevents moving from Paperwork Received to Client Onboarding unless the formal compliance sign-off has been completed via the Compliance Sign-Off quick action.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, 'Client Onboarding'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Stage__c), 'Paperwork Received'), OR( ISNULL(Compliance_Signoff_Date__c), ISBLANK(Compliance_Signoff_Notes__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cannot move to Client Onboarding — formal compliance sign-off is required. Please use the "Compliance Sign-Off" button to complete the approval process.
